entities.name: V
entities.context: Originator of the insight about resume purpose

entities.name: Resume as Sales Deck
entities.context: Framework: resumes should function as sales decks for internal champions, not tests to pass

entities.name: Internal Champion
entities.context: The advocate inside a company who uses the resume to convince skeptical peers

entities.name: Advocate-First Resume Design
entities.context: Principle that a resume's primary job is to make the advocate's job easier

relationships.context: V's insight that resumes should serve the advocate, not just the applicant
The sales deck framing exists to serve the internal champion's persuasion needs
The sales deck metaphor operationalizes the advocate-first principle
